description: As an intelligence analyst, develop a 4-file Talon module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\intel_mapper\ to map entities and relationships from highlighted text to a graph database format using voice commands. Define list: user.entity_type in entity_types.talon-list (person, organization, location, vehicle, telephone, weapon) and list: user.relationship_type in relationship_types.talon-list (member_of, leader_of, located_at, owns, communicated_with, used). Implement intel_mapper.py using Talon's Module and actions to manage state for nodes, edges, and current subject/target. This script must define actions set_entity_subject(entity_type: str), set_entity_target(entity_type: str), link_entities(relationship_type: str), export_graph(), and clear_graph(). The entity actions must capture and strip highlighted text, while export_graph must write nodes to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\nodes.csv (headers: id, type) and edges to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\edges.csv (headers: source, target, relationship) followed by an app notification. Create intel_mapper.talon to map the voice phrases 'entity subject', 'entity target', 'entity link', 'entity export', and 'entity clear' to their respective actions. Ensure valid Python and Talon syntax throughout.
